description: Elegy monorepo release catalog. Each surface is identified by name and explicit repository role.

surfaces.name: elegy-codegraph
surfaces.description: Code graph analysis CLI.

surfaces.name: elegy-configuration
surfaces.description: Configuration materialization CLI.

surfaces.name: elegy-contracts
surfaces.description: Contract export, validation, and project inspection CLI.

surfaces.name: elegy-desktop
surfaces.description: Desktop automation CLI.

surfaces.name: elegy-doc-practices
surfaces.description: Documentation practices skill for ADR/spec doctrine and docs config validation.

surfaces.name: elegy-documentation
surfaces.description: Documentation inspection and validation CLI.

surfaces.name: elegy-mcp
surfaces.description: MCP analysis and authoring CLI.

surfaces.name: elegy-memory
surfaces.description: Memory CLI with embeddings and retrieval.

surfaces.name: elegy-observe
surfaces.description: System observation CLI.

surfaces.name: elegy-question-studio
surfaces.description: Structured quiz question generation and validation for Elegy.

surfaces.name: elegy-ai-radar
surfaces.description: AI release, research, and tooling signal tracking for Elegy.

surfaces.name: elegy-client-radar
surfaces.description: Evidence-backed client discovery and opportunity intelligence for Elegy.

surfaces.name: elegy-opencode-workers
surfaces.description: Supervised read-only OpenCode workers for Codex.

surfaces.name: elegy-checks
surfaces.description: Local-first check registry, runner, and evidence store for Elegy.

surfaces.name: elegy-obsidian
surfaces.description: Obsidian vault bridge skill for read/write/search against local Obsidian vaults.

surfaces.name: elegy-planning
surfaces.description: Durable planning CLI over SQLite.

surfaces.name: elegy-accounts
surfaces.description: Local account authentication, encrypted credential storage, grants, and revocation.

surfaces.name: elegy-plugin-authoring
surfaces.description: Agent-guided Elegy plugin authoring for skill-only plugins, Rust CLI-backed plugins, marketplace wrappers, and downstream plugin repositories.

surfaces.name: elegy-run
surfaces.description: MCP stdio host for running Elegy as an agent server.

surfaces.name: elegy-skill-authoring
surfaces.description: Portable agent skill authoring skill for creating and refining SKILL.md files.

surfaces.name: elegy-memory-mcp-stdio
surfaces.description: MCP stdio transport adapter for the memory plugin.

surfaces.name: elegy-memory-mcp-http
surfaces.description: MCP HTTP transport adapter for the memory plugin.

surfaces.name: elegy-skills
surfaces.description: Skill registry and discovery CLI.
